name: View
_comment: Resources[] mirror of FViewUniformShaderParameters in UE 5.1.1, in BEGIN_GLOBAL_SHADER_PARAMETER_STRUCT declaration order (the order FRHIUniformBufferLayoutInitializer.Resources[] uses). Numeric members[] left empty for now 窶・populate by parsing VIEW_UNIFORM_BUFFER_MEMBER_TABLE if needed. Verified hash by extracting via RURI_SRT_DEBUG=1 against Oni_Valley_VFX cooked shaders.
